author: Himanshu Dongre
name: Causal N-gram Logit Blend — Legal, Bug-Free, Null Result at Scale
blurb: Non-record research submission. Builds the legal reference implementation of an eval-time causal n-gram additive-logit blend (verified against valerio-oai closures #993/#1185/#959 with an 8-probe automated legality harness), then demonstrates across 6 model configurations (2L/4L, 128d/256d, 800–4000 steps, sp1024/sp8192) that the peak BPB improvement collapses from 0.0515 on a very weak baseline to 0.00018 on the strongest model tested — well below the 0.0072 BPB record threshold. Includes a localized delta decomposition showing 100% of the gain comes from context lookups whose first observation is outside the 2048-token attention window, and explains why that architectural floor does not save the approach at scale on larger tokenizers.
